calendar.matters:
PETITION TO ESTABLISH FACT OF MARRIAGE
Off Calendar Mar-05-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Audrey Zitnay, Petitioner (via Zoom).

Ms. Zitnay explained that while a family member possesses an original marriage certificate, certified copies are required for dual citizenship purposes with Italy. The marriage occurred in 1905, but official records were destroyed in the 1906 earthquake. The petition seeks to establish the marriage details for re-recording and future family access.

The court took the matter under submission with the intent to grant.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)
